banner_title: Vincula tu cuenta de OurStage con Discord
step1_title: Para empezar a vincular tu cuenta de OurStage, ve a este canal:
step1_warning:
¡DEBES DE ESTAR EN EL CANAL CORRECTO!
¡Usar comandos en el canal incorrecto NO FUNCIONARA!
step2_title: Escribe <cmd>/link</cmd> y selecciona la primera opción
step2_warning_not_real: Esta no es una ID real!
step2_warning_enter_id: Ingresa tu ID de OurStage aquí
step3_title: Cuando este mensaje aparezca, el comando ha sido exitoso.
step3_desc: ¡Ahora puedes volver al juego y jugar!
id_help_desc: Encuentra tu ID en la pantalla de título de OurStage. Se encuentra en la <loc>{{location}}</loc> de tu pantalla.
id_dash_desc: Presiona la pantalla de inicio, espera a quue cargue un poco, y el juego te va a generar la ID. Como necesitas vincular una cuenta, el juego te mostrara una pantalla de <cmd>Not allowed</cmd>, lo cual es normal, solo presiona <cmd>OK</cmd> para regresar a la pantalla de título.
closing_text: ¡Es muy rápido! Al terminar, ¡ya podrás jugar!
cm_subtitle: Here are 8 ways linking your account could fail. Don't let this be you!
cm_1_desc: Did you actually just type that out? You have to select the slash command from the suggestions list, otherwise the bot will happily ignore you.
cm_2_desc: We have specific channels for this, yet you chose to run it here? Please move to the correct channel, the bot is 'blind' here.
cm_3_desc: The bot only accepts ONE solid continuous string of STANDARD LATIN NUMBERS. No spaces, no dirty text (like <cmd>UserID:</cmd>), no 'Fat' (full-width) numbers, and absolutely NO superscript/tiny fonts (⁰¹²³).
cm_4_desc: Did you drop some digits, type the wrong one, or let the OCR scanner mix up 1 with I and 0 with O? Double check every single number, or you might link someone else's account!
cm_5_desc: Player ID IS JUST NUMBERS! It's not your game version '6.4.0.Luna', not your UUID '1a48...', not a 'JASRAC' license, and definitely not your In-Game Name! Look closely at the screen!
cm_6_title: 6. Using an Official Project SEKAI ID
cm_6_desc: Repeating this for the N-th time: This is OurStage, NOT the official Project SEKAI! Don't just paste your Japanese or Global server ID here. The bot doesn't have access to SEGA's database.
cm_7_desc: Your ID is a hyphen (-)? Are you trying to link with a ghost? Please let the game create your actual ID first!
cm_8_desc: Peak laziness: Seeing someone else mess up and following them blindly instead of reading the guide. Even after being corrected, some still keep copy-pasting the same mistake. Please, just read the instructions!
